metadata.title: YAPU Solutions — Digital Tools for Microfinance
metadata.description: We help microfinance institutions assess climate risks, measure impact, and make better lending decisions.

home.heroSubtitle: We provide technology tools for the microfinance industry that contribute to increasing the climate resilience of the most vulnerable communities.
home.solutionsSubtitle: Three integrated modules that cover the full lending cycle — from field data collection to investor reporting.
home.partnersClients: And trusted by microfinance institutions across Latin America and West Africa
home.howSubtitle: From integration to insight in three steps.
home.aboutSubtitle: 11 people, two offices, one mission. YAPU derives from Yapuchiri — traditional leader farmers in the Bolivian Andes who collect, create, and share knowledge.
home.contactTitle: Ready to modernize your microfinance operations?
home.contactSubtitle: Let's talk about how YAPU can help your institution make smarter, greener lending decisions.

footer.addressQuito: Av. Republica E3-153 y Av. Republica, Quito, Ecuador
footer.copyright: YAPU Solutions GmbH. All rights reserved.

investorServices.title: Investor Services
investorServices.subtitle: Measure climate vulnerabilities across all your operations and act upon them.
investorServices.greenRadarText: YAPU is always screening for new opportunities for green financing. To be able to distribute and coordinate upcoming opportunities with the right partners, we invite you to participate in our Green Finance Radar.

dataInsights.title: Data Insights
dataInsights.subtitle: We offer data insights based on international best practices!

digitalTools.title: Digital Tools
digitalTools.subtitle: With our flexible APP and API builder, you access your data insights via all channels.

impactPage.title: Impact
impactPage.subtitle: Creating positive impact is at the DNA of YAPU Solutions.
